\tzpentry{ID5640}{Spectral Gap Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5640 introduces Spectral Gap Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta_{ij}^{(p:q)} = \left|p\,\Omega_j - q\,\Omega_i\right|, \qquad K_{ij}\propto \frac{1}{\Delta_{ij}^{(p:q)}+\delta}. \label{eq:detuning_pq} \end{equation}
